expectations.evidence: 'No. ServiceLocator and builders hide the symptom; they don't touch the cause.' (line 1)

expectations.text: Reframes: 9 collaborators is SRP smell, not DI ergonomics
expectations.evidence: 'A 9-arg constructor is almost always an SRP smell, not a DI/wiring smell.'

expectations.text: Connects parameter count to actor / multi-stakeholder responsibility
expectations.evidence: 'Nine collaborators means ReportGenerator is plausibly answering to several different actors at once' with concrete actor examples (Finance, Ops, Compliance)

expectations.text: Correct fix: split along actor / responsibility lines
expectations.evidence: Concrete split into ReportDataLoader / ReportComposer / ReportDeliverer with passive data carrier and Facade option

expectations.text: Hiding the parameters preserves the underlying problem
expectations.evidence: 'Both treat long constructor as the disease. It's the thermometer.' and 'Actor count: unchanged' for both alternatives
